parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "ilmu-glm-5.1", messages: [{ role: "system", content: $json.systemMessage }, { role: "user", content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}

parameters.subject: Your StockSense Weekly Newsletter is Here!

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json; const suppliers = data.new_suppliers || []; const weekLabel = data.week_label && data.week_label !== 'Invalid Date' ? data.week_label : new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-MY', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); // Clean up primary emails (some have "email:" prefix) const cleanEmail = e => (e || '').replace(/^.*?:\s*/, '').trim(); // Group by category const byCategory = {}; for (const s of suppliers) { if (!byCategory[s.category]) byCategory[s.category] = []; byCategory[s.category].push(s); } const categoryBlocks = Object.entries(byCategory).map(([cat, list]) => { const isHighRisk = (data.high_risk_categories || []).includes(cat); const rows = list.map(s => { const email = cleanEmail(s.primary_email); return `
${s.company_name}
${(s.description || '').slice(0, 140)}${(s.description || '').length > 140 ? '…' : ''}
${email} Visit site → `; }).join(''); return `

${cat} (${list.length}) ${isHighRisk ? 'STOCKOUT RISK' : ''}

${rows}
Company Contact Email Website
`; }).join(''); const html = ` StockSense Weekly Supplier Discovery
StockSense
Weekly Supplier Discovery
Week of
${weekLabel}
Hi Supply Manager,

${data.intro_paragraph || 'Here are this week\'s newly discovered suppliers.'}

${categoryBlocks || '

No new suppliers discovered this week.

'}

${data.closing_line || ''}

— StockSense Automation
StockSense — Automated supply chain intelligence. Suppliers discovered via Google search.
`; return [{ json: { ...data, newsletter_html: html, total_found: suppliers.length, week_label: weekLabel } }];
